About Us
Fitness is not a destination it is a way of life.
Home About Us

PERMAFLY IS A PIONEER CALISTHENIC, GYMNASTICS, PARKOUR AND YOGA ACADEMY IN INDIA. ITS FIRST CALISTHENICS ACADEMY ESTABLISHED IN DELHI.

PERMAFLY- IS TOTALLY BASED ON A NEW CONCEPT OF MANOUEVRE PATTERN, DESIGNED BY TEAM PERMAFLY TO MAKE YOU ACHIEVE YOUR ULTIMATE FITNESS LEVEL. 

 

 

AT PERMAFLY WE ENCOURAGE ALL THE ATHLETES AND FITNESS ENTHUSIASTS OF INDIA TO TAKE A STEP FORWARD, AND TAKE INDIAN FITNESS TO A NEW HORIZON. WE AS AN ORGANIZATIONS WANTS TO PROVIDE ALL NECESSARY INTERNATIONAL EQUIPMENTS TO OUR ESTEEMED MEMBERS SO THAT THEY CAN SHOWCASE THEIR TALENT ON ANY PLATFORM THEY DESIRE WORLDWIDE.

PERMAFLY is First Delhi indoor Parkour & Calisthenics academy providing coaching & training for all ages and abilities. Come and “Fly with Us” in a safe controlled environment, with experts on hand to guide you in the various aspects of Parkour & Calisthenics.
